knowledge_need: Study topic as Engineer-Philosopher. Attempt 1 of up to 3. Give compact Builder-relevant understanding, validation needs, and return plan.

part_digests.name: core meaning
part_digests.meaning: An atom is a compact reusable learning unit with stable trigger, action, boundary, and expected effect; a case pattern is a recurring situated example cluster that may suggest an atom but still depends on context.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: This distinction prevents Builder from promoting a memorable case into accepted knowledge before it has portable decision value.
compact_missing_knowledge: Exact local acceptance contract for atoms
Minimum evidence required to demote or promote a case pattern
compact_safe_learning_steps: Compare one known accepted atom against one unaccepted case pattern
Extract trigger/action/boundary/effect fields without changing storage
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: A reviewer or validator can classify the same sample as atom, case pattern, or open gap using the same criteria
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return X1 as the classification vocabulary for all later parts.

part_digests.name: why I am not ideal
part_digests.meaning: The weakness exposed is overgeneralization: treating analogy, route notes, or repeated cases as learned capability before proof of retention, retrieval, and behavior change.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Builder learning needs humility about draft knowledge, otherwise it stores fluent descriptions instead of operational improvements.
compact_missing_knowledge: Which current Builder memories are descriptive but not behavior-shaping
Failure cases where a promoted atom would mislead action
compact_safe_learning_steps: List counterexamples for any proposed atom
Keep draft knowledge separate from accepted memory
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: A proposed atom fails promotion if counterexamples break its boundary or no behavior delta is shown
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return X2 as the caution rule: no promotion from elegance or repetition alone.

part_digests.name: builder relevance
part_digests.meaning: For self-build or child-agent build, atoms are the material of compact transferable competence; case patterns are training and diagnostic material that help discover candidate atoms.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: This supports absorption of existing school outputs into active behavior without rebuilding the school or confusing lab cases with live intelligence.
compact_missing_knowledge: How canonical retrieval exposes atoms at decision time
How child-agent builders should inherit boundaries and not just examples
compact_safe_learning_steps: Map each case pattern to candidate atom fields
Check whether a decision path would actually retrieve the candidate
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: A held-out decision reuses the stored atom and produces a measurable behavior delta
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return X3 as the operational reason to separate storage candidates from accepted behavior.

part_digests.name: validation
part_digests.meaning: Understanding is validated only when classification is repeatable, boundaries survive counterexamples, retrieval occurs in the right context, and behavior changes for the intended decision.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: It converts the topic from philosophy into a Builder-safe promotion gate.
compact_missing_knowledge: Which existing validator or proof path should check classification consistency
What behavior delta threshold is sufficient
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return X4 as the required evidence checklist for any atom candidate.

part_digests.name: promotion decision
part_digests.meaning: Default classification should be case pattern unless the learning has stable scope, compact form, retrieval path, and proven behavior effect; otherwise mark it open gap.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: This gives Builder a conservative promotion rule: case pattern for useful recurring context, atom candidate for testable portable rule, open gap for unclear or under-evidenced learning.
compact_missing_knowledge: Required persistence surface for accepted atoms
compact_safe_learning_steps: Classify each candidate as case pattern, atom candidate, or open gap
Record the missing proof without changing accepted state
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Promotion only after fresh proof shows retention, retrieval, decision reuse, and behavior delta
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return X5 as the parent task's decision output.

dependencies: X2 depends on X1 because the weakness is misclassification
X3 depends on X1 because Builder relevance changes by classification
X5 depends on X4 because promotion requires validation evidence
duplicates_or_overlaps: X4 overlaps X5: validation defines the promotion gate
X1 overlaps X3: both separate reusable atoms from situated cases

parent_return_plan.how_to_rebuild_x: Define atom versus case pattern, name the overgeneralization risk, connect it to Builder absorption, then apply a conservative validation gate before any promotion decision.
parent_return_plan.next_small_action: Take one existing learning item and classify it as case pattern, atom candidate, or open gap using trigger/action/boundary/effect plus proof status.
proof_needed: Retention, retrieval, decision reuse, and behavior delta proof

promotion_decision.owner_decision_required: only if promotion beyond case pattern is requested
promotion_decision.reason: Batch source answer is material only; default is compact case pattern with part map and parent return plan.
